title: DOM State, Events, and Accessible Interaction · Runtime Trace: Live Updates
summary: Build a keyboard-operable service-status interface whose DOM, focus, announcements, and visual state stay synchronized. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js live updates increment in an accessible interactive service-status interface. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Announce meaningful asynchronous changes without noisy live regions or focus theft.
Preserve native keyboard behavior, visible focus, logical focus movement, and restoration after dynamic changes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

// javascript-basics cumulative stakeholder program.
